{{Quote|Greetings to you, off-worlder. Are you here as a speculator, or will you be entering the swoop field as a contender?|translated=1|Sslamoth to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Sslamoth''' was a [[Selkath/Legends|Selkath]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who worked with [[T'sllth]] to run the [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] races in [[Ahto City]] [[3956 BBY]]. Together with T'sllth, the duo operated the [[Ahto City swoop track]].
